title: Container Report - Week 17
summary:
Main
Despite some relaxation from original positions on port costs for Chinese built ships and an exemption of many electronics from reciprocal tariffs, the steep decline in China-US container trade continues. Many US-bound vessels are departing China half full as shippers cancel orders due to increased costs. Carriers are blanking sailings rapidly, reminiscent of the early pandemic period.
